patch.value:
GitHub: https://github.com/unbraind/pm-cli/issues/597

The 2026.7.18 CLI returns changed_fields: [] for an empty append but still rewrites updated_at. Align append with the nonblank annotation/title contracts and protect false-freshness semantics. Duplicate check searched all statuses for append, empty/whitespace text, no-op, and updated_at freshness. Closed pm-7je0, pm-45mb, and pm-zwpp are related validation/mutation lineages but do not cover append freshness.
GH-597: reject empty append text without false updated_at freshness
append accepts empty or whitespace-only text as a successful no-op yet advances updated_at, polluting activity, recency ordering, and agent ranking.

append rejects empty and whitespace-only text with structured usage recovery; no-op mutations never advance updated_at; positional and --body forms have parity; integration tests protect activity and recency behavior; GH-597 is resolved

message: Create from GH-597 after all-status duplicate check
